name: parentbond
description: ParentBond React Web/PWA + NestJS + MySQL monorepo.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @parentbond/shared && npm run build -w @parentbond/web && npm run build -w @parentbond/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @parentbond/web && npm run typecheck -w @parentbond/api
